prompt: Please convert this illustration into a botanical painting style on canvas drawn with plant dyes (leaves, stems, flowers, fruits, roots, etc.). Create an organic expression that utilizes the soft bleeding of natural dyes, gentle color unevenness, and the texture of the canvas. Focus on calm, plant-derived earth colors and soft gradients rather than chemical vividness, creating a warm, peaceful, and poetic botanical atmosphere. Do not draw the plants themselves. Completely maintain the composition and characters of the original illustration.
